name: Butcher Wally [ Wally Series ]
description:
[ Never walk home alone with a dead phone ]

You were walking down the street, you had gotten off of work late and couldn't catch/call a cab cause your phone was dead, so you decided to walk. It was starting to get dark out so you quickened your pace. You had passed a butcher shop on the way. After a while you started to feel like someone was watching/following you.

(1 / ?)
